# Volcaniclastics

**Summary**: Rocks and sediments composed of fragments of volcanic origin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] investigated the behavior of volcaniclastics in different sedimentary systems.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Used to understand how volcanic material is redistributed by wind and water.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022]] Mineralogical and chemical analysis of samples.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Merapi's products show distinct mineral sorting based on environmental energy. ([[2022-argadestya|Argadestya, 2022, p. 113]])
